zh.lifeSummary: Christine Goodwyn Lady於1490年出生在英國英格蘭素福爾可斯托克 白 納易藍德。她於1511年與Sir John Mawle I在英國英格蘭素福爾可納易藍德結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1560年5月9日在她的家鄉享年70歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭素福爾可斯托克 白 納易藍德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Christine Goodwyn Lady于1490年出生在英国英格兰素福爾可斯托克 白 納易藍德。她于1511年与Sir John Mawle I在英国英格兰素福爾可納易藍德结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1560年5月9日在她的家乡享年70岁，埋葬在英国英格兰素福爾可斯托克 白 納易藍德。

nameMeanings.name: Goodwyn
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (East Anglia and Middlesex): variant of   Goodwin  .

variants.name: Goodwin
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Godwin (Old English Gōdwine). Compare Godwin .
Irish: adopted in Mayo for Ó Goidín, a variant of Ó Godáin, ‘descendant of Godán’, a diminutive personal name from got ‘stammering, lisping’.

History: This name was brought independently to New England by many bearers from the 17th century onward. William Goodwin was one of the founders of Hartford, CT, in 1635 (coming from Cambridge, MA with Thomas Hooker).

nameMeanings.name: Christine
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   Christina .  It was popular in the medieval period, when it appears to have been used interchangeably with   Christian  , and again in Britain at the end of the 19th century. In the United States it was particularly popular from the 1950s to the 1970s.

variants.name: Christeen
meanings: form of   Christina .  It was popular in the medieval period, when it appears to have been used interchangeably with   Christian  , and again in Britain at the end of the 19th century. In the United States it was particularly popular from the 1950s to the 1970s.

en.lifeSummary: Christine Goodwyn Lady was born in 1490, in Stoke by Nayland, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom. She married Sir John Mawle I in 1511, in Nayland, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 3 daughters. She died on 9 May 1560, in her hometown, at the age of 70, and was buried in Stoke by Nayland, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom.

Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 9 mai 1560, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 70 ans, et a été enterrée à Stoke by Nayland, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

ja.lifeSummary: Christine Goodwyn Ladyは1490年にイギリスイギリススフォルクストク ビー ナイランドで生まれた。1511年にイギリスイギリススフォルクナイランドでSir John Mawle Iと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1560年5月9日に故郷で70歳で死去し，イギリスイギリススフォルクストク ビー ナイランドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Christine Goodwyn Lady(은)는 1490년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 스토크 비 나이랜드에서 태어났다. 그녀는 1511년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 나이랜드에서 Sir John Mawle I(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1560년 5월 9일 그녀의 고향에서 70세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 스토크 비 나이랜드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Christine Goodwyn Lady nasceu em 1490, em Stoke by Nayland, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ela casou-se com Sir John Mawle I em 1511, em Nayland, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 9 de maio de 1560, em sua cidade natal, com 70 anos, e foi sepultada em Stoke by Nayland, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Christine Goodwyn Lady родилась в 1490 г. в местности сток би неиланд, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir John Mawle I в 1511 г. в местности неиланд, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 3 дочери. Она умерла 9 мая 1560 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 70 лет и была похоронена в местности сток би неиланд, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания.
